title: hymenophyllum valvatum
intro: Hymenophyllum valvatum, also known as the tooth fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum valvatum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves of the tooth fern are often dried and used to make teas or infusions for medicinal purposes.
